vision_profile.current_state: Shivani is a 3rd-year Computer Science student and an AI Developer Intern, gaining practical experience.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her primary challenge is transitioning from an internship to a full-time AI developer role within six months.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to secure a stable and rewarding full-time AI position immediately after her internship.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You solidify core programming and data handling skills, understand fundamental AI/ML concepts, and prepare for entry-level AI development tasks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a robust foundation, transforming your internship experience into a launchpad for a full-time AI career.

video.title: OOP Concepts for Scalable AI Code
Managing Dependencies with Pip and Conda

science.desc: You encounter a Python script with a `KeyError` in a dictionary operation. Identify the root cause and propose a robust solution using `try-except` blocks.

modules.title: Data Wrangling
lessons: Introduction to NumPy for numerical operations

science.desc: You are given a CSV file with inconsistent date formats, missing values, and duplicate entries. Outline the steps you would take using Pandas to clean and prepare this dataset for analysis.

modules.title: Deep Learning Basics
lessons: Training and evaluation of simple models

video.title: Understanding the Building Blocks of Deep Learning
How Neural Networks Learn: Backpropagation Explained

science.desc: Explain the concept of backpropagation in a neural network and why it's crucial for training deep learning models.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can implement and evaluate various supervised and unsupervised machine learning models, understand feature engineering, and build basic ML pipelines.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a hands-on problem-solver, applying machine learning algorithms to real-world data challenges.

modules.title: Supervised Learning
lessons: Model evaluation metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC)

science.desc: You're building a fraud detection model. The dataset is highly imbalanced. Which evaluation metrics would you prioritize, and why? How would you handle the imbalance?

video.title: Simplifying Data with PCA and t-SNE

science.desc: When would you choose K-Means clustering over Hierarchical clustering, and what are the key considerations for each?

modules.title: Feature Engineering & Pipelines
lessons: Creating new features from existing data

video.title: Crafting Impactful Features for ML Models

science.desc: You need to create a feature that represents the 'day of the week' from a datetime column and then apply one-hot encoding. Design a Scikit-learn pipeline to achieve this, including a custom transformer if necessary.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can design and implement deep learning models for computer vision and natural language processing tasks, and work with image data effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now specializing, bringing advanced AI capabilities to visual and textual data challenges.

video.title: Building Blocks of Convolutional Neural Networks
Leveraging Pre-trained Models for Image Tasks
Introduction to Detecting Objects in Images

science.desc: Explain the key differences between image classification, object detection, and image segmentation tasks in computer vision.

video.title: Preparing Text Data for NLP Models
Processing Sequential Data with Recurrent Networks

science.desc: What are the limitations of traditional RNNs, and how do LSTMs and GRUs address these limitations?

modules.title: OpenCV Basics
lessons: Drawing shapes and text on images

video.title: Reading and Writing Images with OpenCV
Applying Filters and Detecting Edges with OpenCV

science.desc: You need to preprocess images for a computer vision model. Describe how you would use OpenCV to resize, convert to grayscale, and apply a Gaussian blur to reduce noise.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can deploy machine learning models as APIs, monitor their performance in production, and understand cloud deployment strategies.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now building bridges between models and real-world applications, ensuring AI systems are robust and reliable.

video.title: Understanding How APIs Work for ML Models

science.desc: You have a trained sentiment analysis model and need to expose it as a web service. Describe the steps to containerize this model using Docker and create a simple API endpoint for predictions.

modules.title: MLOps & Monitoring
lessons: Logging and alerting for ML systems

video.title: Keeping ML Models Healthy in Production

science.desc: A deployed recommendation engine starts showing degraded performance. What MLOps monitoring tools and strategies would you use to detect, diagnose, and resolve this issue?

modules.title: Cloud & Deployment
lessons: Introduction to cloud computing for AI (AWS/GCP/Azure overview)
Managed ML services (SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure ML)
Data storage in the cloud (S3, GCS)
Security best practices in the cloud

video.title: Leveraging Cloud Platforms for AI Workloads
Optimizing and Securing Cloud AI Deployments

science.desc: You need to deploy a high-traffic ML inference service. Compare and contrast using serverless functions versus a Kubernetes cluster for this scenario, considering scalability, cost, and operational overhead.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You master advanced generative AI models, including Transformers, and can apply prompting techniques, fine-tuning, and RAG for complex applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are at the forefront of AI innovation, crafting intelligent systems that generate novel content and insights.

modules.title: Transformers & Attention
lessons: Limitations of RNNs for long sequences
BERT, GPT, and other Transformer models overview

video.title: Focusing on Relevant Information with Attention

scenario.title: Tracing Data Flow in a Transformer

science.desc: You are tasked with summarizing long documents. How would you leverage the attention mechanism in a Transformer model to achieve this, and what are the key components involved?

modules.title: Prompting & Inference Techniques
lessons: Temperature, top-p, and other inference parameters

video.title: Assessing the Quality of Generative Models

science.desc: You are developing a chatbot for customer support. How would you use few-shot prompting to improve its responses for specific product queries without extensive fine-tuning?

modules.title: RAG & Capstone
lessons: Vector databases and embeddings for retrieval
Capstone Project: Building a RAG-powered chatbot

scenario.title: Designing a RAG System for Internal Docs

video.title: Adapting LLMs to Specific Tasks and Data

science.desc: Your company has a vast internal knowledge base. Design a RAG system that allows employees to query this knowledge base using natural language and get accurate, context-aware answers.

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can design scalable, reliable, and secure AI-powered systems, understanding distributed architectures and performance optimization.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a visionary architect, building the robust infrastructure that powers cutting-edge AI solutions.

video.title: Core Concepts of Building Robust Systems
Designing Systems for High Availability and Performance

science.desc: Design a system for a real-time recommendation engine. Discuss how you would handle data ingestion, model inference, and serve recommendations with low latency and high availability.

modules.title: Distributed Systems
lessons: Data consistency in distributed systems (CAP Theorem)

video.title: Ensuring Data Integrity in Distributed Environments

scenario.title: Handling Service Outages in a Microservice Architecture

science.desc: A critical microservice in your AI pipeline goes down. Describe how you would design the system to minimize impact and ensure quick recovery, considering fault tolerance and resilience patterns.

modules.title: AI-Powered Systems
lessons: Integrating AI models into larger systems
Monitoring and maintaining AI systems at scale

video.title: Building Fair and Transparent AI Systems

science.desc: Discuss the ethical considerations when designing an AI system for hiring decisions. How would you mitigate bias and ensure fairness in such a system?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You lead the development of cutting-edge AI solutions, explore multimodal applications, contribute to research, and mentor junior engineers.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a trailblazer, pushing the boundaries of AI and shaping the future of intelligent technologies.

video.title: Combining Different Data Modalities in AI
Exploring the Horizon of Artificial Intelligence

science.desc: Your team is developing an AI assistant that needs to understand both spoken commands and visual cues. How would you approach building such a multimodal AI system?

modules.title: Research Literacy
lessons: Reading and understanding AI research papers

video.title: Engaging with the Global AI Community

science.desc: You've read a new research paper proposing a novel AI architecture. Describe your process for evaluating its potential, reproducing its results, and integrating it into your team's workflow.
